title: Kamal Hinduja Geneva, Switzerland(Swiss) : Can Monday.com be used effectively for agile sprint planning?
excerpt:
Hi , 
I am Kamal Hinduja, based in Geneva, Switzerland. Can anyone explain in detail whether Monday.com can be used effectively for Agile sprint planning? 
Thanks, Regards 
Kamal Hinduja Geneva, Switzerland
